arts.sum: "For me, I know it's been four clean sheets in five for Rangers, but I still look defensively and think there could be improvement there. Get the latest news sent straight to your messages by joining our Rangers WhatsApp community today.

arts.ttl: Why Rangers should have stuck by Gio van Bronckhorst as Antonio Colak addresses struggles
arts.sum: Just months before, he had guided the team to a Europa League final and a Scottish Cup triumph so there was one school of thought that he should have had enough credit in the bank. Addressing his struggles, he explained: "Under Gio, I had the run of games and trust I needed - that's why I was able to score a lot of goals.

arts.ttl: Sead Haksabanovic snubs Celtic phone call for Rangers inside track as Malmo star explains unshakeable belief
arts.sum: The wide man will be hoping to see his new club deal Philippe Clement's side a Europa League hammerblow

arts.ttl: Sead Haksabanovic plots Rangers misery as ex Celtic star warns Malmo are brimming with confidence
arts.sum: Of course, I want to win tomorrow and it's also special because I played for Celtic and I want my team to win and start the Europa League in a good way. He won't be available tomorrow but after winning three of his four Old Firm encounters in Glasgow, Haksabanovic has full belief that his new club can get their European campaign off to the perfect start by downing the Light Blues.
